debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_1
inst✝² : Fintype d
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq d
𝕜 : Type u_5
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
A B : Matrix d d 𝕜
hA : A.IsHermitian
hB : B.IsHermitian
hAB : Commute A B
j : d
⊢ A.mulVec ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j) =
    @Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB j •
      WithLp.ofLp ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j)

failed_attempts:
let b := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let v := b j
  let e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = Fintype.card _)
  let k := e j
  have hv : A *ᵥ v = (k.1.1.val : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis] at v
    simp only [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply] at v
    have h_mem := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (hA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB hAB) rfl
      (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB) k
    rw [Submodule.mem_inf, mem_eigenspace_iff] at h_mem
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_apply, h_mem.1]
    rfl
  rw [hv]
  congr
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, hv]
  have h_real : (k.1.1.val : 𝕜) = (RCLike.re k.1.1.val : 𝕜) := by
    rw [RCLike.ofReal_re]
    exact isSymmetric_eigenvalue_real (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) _
  conv_lhs => rw [h_real]
  simp only [smul_eq_mul, dotProduct_smul_right, map_mul, RCLike.re_ofReal_mul]
  rw [← dotProduct_eq_inner]
  simp [b.orthonormal.1 j]

set b := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  set v := b j
  let L := A.toEuclideanLin
  let equiv := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (α := d) (β := Σ (μ : Eigenvalues L × Eigenvalues B.toEuclideanLin), ↥(eigenspace L μ.1 ⊓ eigenspace B.toEuclideanLin μ.2)) (by simp)
  let k := equiv j
  have hv : v = (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB) |>.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' k := rfl
  let μ := k.1.1
  have h_eig : v ∈ eigenspace L μ := (Submodule.mem_inf.mp ((isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB) |>.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' k)).1
  have h_Av : A *ᵥ (WithLp.ofLp v) = (μ : 𝕜) • (WithLp.ofLp v) := by
    rw [← Matrix.ofLp_toEuclideanLin_apply, mem_eigenspace_iff.mp h_eig, map_smul]
  rw [h_Av, sharedEigenvalueA, h_Av]
  have h_real : RCLike.im (μ : 𝕜) = 0 := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).im_eigenvalue_eq_zero μ.2
  simp only [Matrix.dotProduct_smul_right, RCLike.re_mul_of_im_eq_zero_left h_real]
  have h_norm : RCLike.re (dotProduct v v) = 1 := by
    simpa using b.orthonormal j
  rw [h_norm, mul_one, RCLike.re_eq_self_of_im_eq_zero h_real]

unfold sharedEigenbasis LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis
  simp only [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  let O := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)
  let D := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  let idx := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toFun j
  have h_mem := D.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem rfl O idx
  have h_eig : A *ᵥ (D.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl O idx) = (idx.1.1 : 𝕜) • (D.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl O idx) := by
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, (Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff _ _).1 h_mem.1]
  rw [h_eig]
  congr
  unfold sharedEigenvalueA sharedEigenbasis LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis
  simp only [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply, h_eig, dotProduct_smul]
  rw [RCLike.re_mul_ofReal, RCLike.ofReal_re]
  simp [dotProduct, inner, Matrix.dotProduct, inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K, (D.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl O).orthonormal.1 idx]

let b := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let decomp := hA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB hAB
  let basis := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB)
  let k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = Fintype.card (Σ i, ↥(decomp.submodules i))) j)
  have hv : b j = basis k := by
    simp [b, sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  have h_eig : A *ᵥ (b j) = (k.1.1.val : 𝕜) • (b j) := by
    rw [hv]
    have mem := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem rfl (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB) k
    have memA : basis k ∈ Module.End.eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin k.1.1 := (Submodule.mem_inf.mp mem).1
    simpa [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply] using memA
  rw [h_eig, sharedEigenvalueA, h_eig]
  simp [RCLike.real_smul_eq_coe_mul]

let L_A := A.toEuclideanLin
  let L_B := B.toEuclideanLin
  have hA_sym := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hB_sym := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hAB_comm := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  let B := LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis hA_sym hB_sym hAB_comm
  let v := B j
  have hv : v = sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j := rfl
  let equiv := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis.proof_1 hA_sym hB_sym hAB_comm)
  let idx := equiv j
  let μ := idx.1.1.val
  have h_eig : L_A v = μ • v := by
    change v with (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis hA_sym hB_sym hAB_comm) j
    rw [LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
    exact (DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (hA_sym.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB_sym hAB_comm) rfl
      (hA_sym.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB_sym) idx).1
  rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_apply] at h_eig
  rw [h_eig]
  congr
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, hv, ← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_apply, h_eig, dotProduct_smul_right]
  have h_real : RCLike.im μ = 0 := by
    rw [← LinearMap.IsSymmetric.hasEigenvalue_iff_isReal hA_sym]
    exact ⟨v, B.ne_zero j, h_eig⟩
  simp [RCLike.re_eq_self_of_im_eq_zero h_real, B.orthonormal.1 j]

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  let hA_symm := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  let hB_symm := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  let hAB_comm := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  
  -- Unfold the definition to access the underlying basis structure
  have hv : v = sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j := rfl
  rw [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis] at hv
  
  -- v is an element of the reindexed orthonormal basis
  -- Let k be the index in the direct sum decomposition corresponding to j
  let k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis.proof_1 hA_symm hB_symm hAB_comm)) j
  let μ := k.1.1 -- The eigenvalue of A
  
  -- Show that v is an eigenvector of A with eigenvalue μ
  have h_eig : A *ᵥ v = μ.1 • v := by
    rw [hv, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
    -- The basis vector comes from the subordinate basis of the eigenspace decomposition
    have h_basis_mem := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply
      (hA_symm.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB_symm hAB_comm) k.1 k.2
    -- The subspace is the intersection of eigenspaces
    have h_mem : (hA_symm.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB_symm hAB_comm).subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
        (hA_symm.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB_symm) k ∈ eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin μ.1 := by
      rw [h_basis_mem]
      exact (Submodule.mem_inf.mp (Submodule.coe_mem _)).1
    -- Convert to matrix multiplication
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_apply]
    exact mem_eigenspace_iff.mp h_mem

  -- Show that sharedEigenvalueA gives μ
  -- We assume dotProduct is compatible with the inner product or v is real,
  -- as required for the consistency of the definitions provided.
  have h_val : sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j = μ.1 := by
    simp only [sharedEigenvalueA, h_eig, dotProduct_smul]
    -- Since A is Hermitian, eigenvalues are real
    have h_real : (μ.1 : 𝕜) = (μ.1 : ℝ) := (hA_symm.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue μ.2).symm
    rw [h_real, RCLike.ofReal_mul, RCLike.ofReal_re]
    simp

  -- Combine the results
  rw [h_eig, h_val]
  have h_real : (μ.1 : 𝕜) = (μ.1 : ℝ) := (hA_symm.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue μ.2).symm
  rw [h_real]
  simp

let hAs := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  let hBs := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  let hABs := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  set v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  set b := (hAs.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hBs hABs).subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
    (hAs.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hBs)
  have hv : v = b ((Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).symm j) := by
    dsimp [v, sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
    rw [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  set k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).symm j
  let μ := k.1.1
  have h_eig : A.toEuclideanLin v = (μ : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [hv]
    have := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (hAs.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hBs hABs) rfl
      (hAs.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hBs) k
    exact this.1.1
  rw [RCLike.real_smul_eq_coe_smul]
  convert h_eig using 1
  · rw [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply]
  · dsimp [sharedEigenvalueA]
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, h_eig]
    simp only [inner_smul_right, RCLike.ofReal_real_eq_id, id_eq]
    rw [inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_real]
    have : ‖v‖ = 1 := by
      rw [hv]
      exact b.orthonormal.1 k
    simp [this]
    rfl

end Matrix.SharedEigenbasis

set v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  let decomp := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute'
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  let basis := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
    ((isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB))
  set k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = _)) j
  have h_mem : v ∈ Module.End.eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin k.1.1 := by
    have := basis.toBasis.prop_map k
    rw [DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply] at this
    exact (Submodule.mem_inf.mp this).1
  have h_eig : A.toEuclideanLin v = (k.1.1 : 𝕜) • v := Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff.mp h_mem
  rw [← Matrix.ofLp_toEuclideanLin_apply, h_eig]
  congr
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, ← Matrix.ofLp_toEuclideanLin_apply, h_eig,
    Matrix.dotProduct_smul, Matrix.dotProduct_comm]
  have h_norm : dotProduct v v = 1 := by convert basis.orthonormal.1 k
  rw [h_norm, mul_one]
  exact (RCLike.re_eq_self_of_im_eq_zero (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.hasEigenvalue_im_eq_zero
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) k.1.2)).symm

let b := Matrix.sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let v := b j
  -- Retrieve the eigenvalues from the index of the underlying basis
  let equiv := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = Fintype.card (Σ (μ₁₂ : Eigenvalues A.toEuclideanLin × Eigenvalues B.toEuclideanLin), ↥(eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin μ₁₂.1 ⊓ eigenspace B.toEuclideanLin μ₁₂.2)))
  let idx := equiv j
  let μ := idx.1.1

  have h_eig : A *ᵥ v = (μ : 𝕜) • v := by
    let L_A := A.toEuclideanLin
    let L_B := B.toEuclideanLin
    have hLA := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
    have hLB := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
    let decomp := hLA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hLB (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
    let fam := hLA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hLB
    have h_mem := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem rfl fam idx
    exact mem_eigenspace_iff.mp h_mem.1

  have h_real : (μ : 𝕜) = (μ : ℝ) := by
    have hLA := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
    have := hLA.hasEigenvalue_isReal idx.1.1.2
    exact (RCLike.isSelfAdjoint_iff.mp this).symm

  rw [h_eig, sharedEigenvalueA, h_eig, dotProduct_smul_right]
  simp only [h_real, RCLike.real_smul_eq_coe_mul, smul_eq_mul, RCLike.re_to_real]
  congr 1
  -- Simplify using the fact that v is normalized
  convert (mul_one (μ : ℝ)).symm
  congr
  rw [RCLike.ofReal_re]
  -- We rely on dotProduct coinciding with inner product for the given basis
  trans (1 : ℝ)
  · congr; simpa using b.orthonormal j j
  · simp

let b := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let v := b j
  let ie := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card _ = Fintype.card _)
  let decomp := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute'
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  let fam := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)
  let sub_basis := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl fam
  have h_eq : v = sub_basis (ie j) := by
    simp [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  have h_mem := sub_basis.apply_mem (ie j)
  rw [← h_eq, Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at h_mem
  have h_mat : A *ᵥ (WithLp.ofLp v) = ((ie j).1.1 : 𝕜) • (WithLp.ofLp v) := by
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, h_mem.1]
    rfl
  rw [h_mat, sharedEigenvalueA]
  congr
  simp only [h_mat, map_smul, Algebra.id.smul_eq_mul, Matrix.dotProduct_smul]
  have h_norm : Matrix.dotProduct (star (WithLp.ofLp v)) (WithLp.ofLp v) = 1 := by
    change inner v v = 1
    exact b.orthonormal.1 j
  rw [h_norm, mul_one]
  exact RCLike.ofReal_re ((isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).isReal_of_hasEigenvalue (ie j).1.1.2)

let L := A.toEuclideanLin
  have hL := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  let idx := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toFun j
  have hv : A *ᵥ (WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j)) =
      (idx.1.1 : 𝕜) • (WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j)) := by
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply]
    have h := (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hL (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)
      (commute_euclideanLin hAB)).subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem_coe idx rfl
      (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hL _)
    exact (Submodule.mem_inf.mp h).1
  rw [hv, sharedEigenvalueA, hv, Matrix.dotProduct_smul]
  have h_real : (idx.1.1 : 𝕜) = (idx.1.1 : ℝ) := (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.hasEigenvalue_iff_isReal hL idx.1.1.2).symm
  rw [h_real, smul_eq_mul, RCLike.re_mul_of_real, ← h_real]
  congr 1
  rw [← inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K]
  exact (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis hL (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)).orthonormal.1 _

rw [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
  set L := A.toEuclideanLin
  set K := B.toEuclideanLin
  have hL : L.IsSymmetric := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hK : K.IsSymmetric := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hLK : Commute L K := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  set decomp := hL.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hK hLK
  set fam := hL.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hK
  set B := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl fam
  set e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card (Σ i, _) = Fintype.card d)
  let v := (B.reindex e) j
  let σ := e j
  let μ := σ.1.1
  have h_eig : L v = μ.1 • v :=
    mem_eigenspace_iff.mp (DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem_submodule decomp rfl fam σ).1
  rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply]
  change L v = _
  rw [h_eig]
  congr
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
  dsimp only
  rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, h_eig, dotProduct_smul, RCLike.re_mul_of_real (hL.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue μ.2)]
  simp only [B.toOrthonormalSystem.norm_apply σ, ← inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K]
  try simp [dotProduct] -- Attempts to handle dotProduct/inner correspondence if implicit
  congr

let hAs := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  let hBs := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  let hABs := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  let OB := (hAs.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hBs hABs).subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl (hAs.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hBs)
  let e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = Fintype.card OB.index)
  let k := e.symm j
  let μ := k.1.1
  let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  have hv : v = OB k := by
    dsimp [v, sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex]
    simp
  have h_eig : A *ᵥ v = μ • v := by
    rw [hv]
    have h_mem := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (hAs.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hBs hABs)
      rfl
      (hAs.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hBs)
      k
    rw [Submodule.mem_inf, mem_eigenspace_iff] at h_mem
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_apply]
    exact h_mem.1
  rw [h_eig, RCLike.real_smul_eq_coe_mul, ← h_eig]
  congr 1
  dsimp [sharedEigenvalueA]
  rw [h_eig, Matrix.dotProduct_smul_right]
  have h_real : RCLike.im (μ : 𝕜) = 0 := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.conj_eigenvalue_eq_self hAs μ.2
  rw [smul_eq_mul, RCLike.re_mul_of_real (μ : 𝕜) h_real]
  congr 1
  rw [hv]
  convert OB.orthonormal.1 k

-- Extract the basis vector and its properties from the construction
  let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  let B := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute'
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
    |>.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl ((isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB))
  let e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis.proof_1 (d := d))
  -- Identify the eigenvalue μ associated with the index j
  let μ := (e j).1.1
  -- Verify v is an eigenvector of A with eigenvalue μ
  have hv : A *ᵥ v = (μ : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_apply]
    have h_mem := B.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem_submodule (e j)
    exact Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff.mp (Submodule.mem_inf.mp h_mem).1
  rw [hv]
  congr
  -- Verify sharedEigenvalueA matches μ
  simp only [sharedEigenvalueA, hv, Matrix.dotProduct_smul_right, RCLike.re_smul (μ : 𝕜) _,
    LinearMap.IsSymmetric.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
    (Module.End.hasEigenvalue_of_mem_eigenspace (Submodule.mem_inf.mp (B.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem_submodule (e j))).1)]
  -- Assuming consistency between dotProduct and inner product for the constructed basis
  convert mul_one μ
  rw [← inner_self_eq_one_iff.mpr (OrthonormalBasis.orthonormal (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB) j)]
  rfl

let b := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  have h_mem := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute'
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
    |>.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
    ((isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB))
    ((Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toEquiv j)
  rw [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff, Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply] at h_mem
  have heq := h_mem.1
  rw [heq, sharedEigenvalueA, heq, dotProduct_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  congr 1
  let μ := ((Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toEquiv j).1.1
  have hμ : RCLike.im μ = 0 := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).isReal_of_hasEigenvalue
    (Module.End.hasEigenvalue_of_hasEigenvector heq (b.orthonormal.ne_zero j))
  rw [RCLike.real_smul_eq_coe_mul, ← RCLike.re_eq_self_of_im_eq_zero hμ, map_mul,
    RCLike.re_eq_self_of_im_eq_zero hμ]
  congr 1
  -- Note: This step assumes dotProduct coincides with inner product (real case) or similar
  -- simplification implied by the context of sharedEigenvalueA's definition.
  convert (mul_one μ).symm
  rw [← b.orthonormal.1 j, ← inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K]
  rfl

set v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  rw [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
  set b := _
  set e := _
  have h := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB) |>.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem rfl _ (e j)
  rw [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply] at h
  rw [Submodule.mem_inf, mem_eigenspace_iff, Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply] at h
  convert h.1
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, h.1]
  simp only [dotProduct_smul, RCLike.re_coe_real, mul_eq_mul_left_iff, true_or]
  convert (mul_one _).symm
  simp only [RCLike.re_coe_real, RCLike.ofReal_re]
  have ho := (Matrix.sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB).orthonormal.1 j
  rw [← dotProduct_star_self_eq_norm_sq] at ho
  convert ho
  -- The following step assumes v is real or dotProduct behaves as inner product in this context
  -- consistent with the definition of sharedEigenvalueA.
  simp [star_eq_conjTranspose]

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  -- We identify the eigenvalue from the basis construction
  let k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = Fintype.card (Σ i : Eigenvalues A.toEuclideanLin × Eigenvalues B.toEuclideanLin, Fin (FiniteDimensional.finrank 𝕜 (eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin i.1 ⊓ eigenspace B.toEuclideanLin i.2))))) j
  have hv : A *ᵥ v = (k.1.1 : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
    have := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB) |>.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB) k
    simpa [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply] using this.1
  convert hv
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, hv, dotProduct_smul, smul_eq_mul, RCLike.re_mul]
  have h_real : RCLike.im (k.1.1 : 𝕜) = 0 := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.eigenvalues_isReal (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) k.1.1
  simp [h_real, RCLike.re_eq_self_of_im_eq_zero h_real]

let hAs := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  let hBs := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  let hABs := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  rw [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  generalize hk : (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp) : d ≃ _) j = k
  have mem := (hAs.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hBs hABs).subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
    (hAs.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hBs) k
  rcases mem with ⟨memA, -⟩
  rw [Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at memA
  rw [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_eq_mulVec] at memA
  rw [memA]
  congr
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply, hk]
  rw [memA]
  simp only [dotProduct_smul, dotProduct_self_eq_norm_sq]
  rw [((hAs.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hBs hABs).subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
    (hAs.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hBs)).orthonormal k]
  simp only [one_pow, mul_one]
  exact (RCLike.isSelfAdjoint_iff.mp (hAs.hasEigenvalue_isSelfAdjoint k.1.1.2)).symm

let basis := LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis hA.isSymmetric hB.isSymmetric (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  let idx := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis.proof_1 hA.isSymmetric hB.isSymmetric (commute_euclideanLin hAB))) j
  have hv : sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j = basis idx := by
    simp [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
  rw [hv]
  have h_eig := (hA.isSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB.isSymmetric idx.1).basis_mem idx.2
  rw [Submodule.mem_inf] at h_eig
  have h_real : (idx.1.1 : 𝕜) = RCLike.ofReal (RCLike.re idx.1.1) :=
    hA.isSymmetric.eigenvalues_isReal idx.1.1.2
  rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_iff] at h_eig
  rw [h_eig.1, sharedEigenvalueA, hv, h_eig.1, dotProduct_smul]
  rw [h_real, RCLike.re_ofReal_mul, RCLike.ofReal_mul, RCLike.ofReal_re]
  congr 1
  have h_norm := basis.orthonormal idx idx
  convert (congr_arg RCLike.re h_norm)
  dsimp [inner, dotProduct]

let L_A := A.toEuclideanLin
  let L_B := B.toEuclideanLin
  have hA_symm : L_A.IsSymmetric := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hB_symm : L_B.IsSymmetric := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hAB_comm : Commute L_A L_B := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  let B := LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis hA_symm hB_symm hAB_comm
  have hB_eq : Matrix.sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB = B := rfl
  rw [hB_eq]
  let decomp := hA_symm.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB_symm hAB_comm
  let fam := hA_symm.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB_symm
  let idx := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp) j
  have h_vec : B j = decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis fam idx := by
    dsimp [LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]; rw [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  have h_mem : B j ∈ eigenspace L_A idx.1.1 := by
    rw [h_vec]; exact (DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem decomp fam idx).1.1
  have h_eig : L_A (B j) = idx.1.1.val • (B j) := mem_eigenspace_iff.mp h_mem
  have h_mul : A *ᵥ (B j) = L_A (B j) := by rw [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply]; rfl
  rw [h_mul, h_eig]
  congr 1
  rw [Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA, hB_eq]
  dsimp only
  rw [h_mul, h_eig, dotProduct_smul]
  have h_norm : dotProduct (B j) (B j) = 1 := by
    simpa using B.orthonormal.1 j
  rw [h_norm, mul_one]
  rw [← RCLike.eq_conj_iff_re]
  exact IsSelfAdjoint.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue hA_symm idx.1.1.property

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  let e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (d := d) (by simp)
  let k := e j
  let decomp := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  let fam := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)
  let μ := (decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_index fam k).1
  have h_eig : A.toEuclideanLin v = μ.val • v := by
    have := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem fam k
    rw [Submodule.mem_inf, mem_eigenspace_iff] at this
    exact this.1
  have h_vec : A *ᵥ v = μ.val • v := by
    rw [← Matrix.ofLp_toEuclideanLin_apply, h_eig]
    rfl
  rw [h_vec]
  congr
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, h_vec]
  have h_real : RCLike.im μ.val = 0 := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.hasEigenvalue_iff_isReal (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) |>.mp μ.property
  simp only [map_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [← RCLike.ofReal_re μ.val, ← RCLike.conj_eq_iff_im.mpr h_real]
  congr
  simpa using OrthonormalBasis.orthonormal (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB) j

simp only [sharedEigenvalueA]
  let k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toFun j
  have hk := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_mem
    (hA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB hAB)
    (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB)
    rfl k
  rcases hk with ⟨hkA, -⟩
  rw [LinearMap.mem_eigenspace_iff, ← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply] at hkA
  rw [hkA]
  congr 1
  rw [hkA, dotProduct_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  have : RCLike.im (k.1.1 : 𝕜) = 0 :=
    LinearMap.IsSymmetric.hasEigenvalue_imp_isReal (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) k.1.1.2
  rw [RCLike.re_mul_of_im_zero _ this, mul_eq_mul_left_iff]
  left
  simp

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  let μ := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toFun j |>.1
  have hv : A *ᵥ v = (μ.1 : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply]
    have := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute'
        (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)
        (commute_euclideanLin hAB))
      (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' _ _)
      _ (by rfl) (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp) j)
    exact this.1.1
  rw [hv, sharedEigenvalueA, hv, dotProduct_smul]
  have hμ : (μ.1 : 𝕜) = (μ.1 : ℝ) :=
    (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.hasEigenvalue_iff_isReal (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) μ.1.2).symm
  rw [hμ, smul_eq_mul, RCLike.re_mul_of_isReal, ← hμ, ← smul_assoc]
  congr 1
  have : RCLike.re (dotProduct v v) = 1 := by
    simpa using OrthonormalBasis.orthonormal (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB) j
  rw [this, mul_one]

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  rw [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  let k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toFun j
  let μ := k.1
  let decomp := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).directSum_isInternal_of_commute'
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  let fam := (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace'
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)
  have hv : v ∈ eigenspace (Matrix.toEuclideanLin A) μ.1.val :=
    Submodule.mem_inf.mp (decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem fam k).1
  rw [Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff, Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply] at hv
  rw [hv, sharedEigenvalueA, hv, Matrix.dotProduct_smul]
  have h_real : μ.1.val.im = 0 :=
    LinearMap.IsSymmetric.eigenvalue_isReal (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) μ.1.prop
  simp only [RCLike.re_eq_self_of_im_eq_zero h_real, smul_eq_mul]
  congr
  rw [mul_comm]
  congr
  -- Since A is Hermitian, we can assume the shared eigenbasis consists of real vectors or
  -- that the dotProduct definition used aligns with the inner product for these vectors.
  -- For the purpose of this proof, we rely on the property that dotProduct of a normalized
  -- eigenvector with itself is 1 in this context.
  have h_norm : Matrix.dotProduct v v = 1 := by
    -- This step would require `v` to be real or `dotProduct` to be `inner`.
    -- Given the context uses `dotProduct` for eigenvalues, we assume consistency.
    simpa [Matrix.dotProduct, inner] using (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB).orthonormal j j
  rw [h_norm, RCLike.re_one]

let b := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let v := b j
  dsimp [sharedEigenvalueA]
  let idx := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp [b, sharedEigenbasis])).toFun j
  have h_mem : v ∈ eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin idx.1.1 := by
    dsimp [v, b, sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, idx]
    rw [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
    refine (DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem ?_ ?_ idx).1
  rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, mem_eigenspace_iff.mp h_mem]
  simp only [map_smul, dotProduct_smul, smul_eq_mul, RCLike.re_to_complex,
    RCLike.coe_real_eq_id, RCLike.re_mul_of_real]
  congr 1
  trans (1 : ℝ)
  · rw [← RCLike.re_one]; congr; convert b.orthonormal.1 j
  · ring

let B := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let v := B j
  let S := hA.isSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB.isSymmetric (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  let O := hA.isSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB.isSymmetric
  let e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)
  let k := e.symm j
  have h_basis : v = S.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl O k := by
    dsimp [v, B, Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
    rw [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
    rfl
  have h_mem := S.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem rfl O k
  rw [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at h_mem
  have hv : A *ᵥ WithLp.ofLp v = k.1.1 • WithLp.ofLp v := by
    rw [h_basis, ← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, h_mem.1]
    rfl
  rw [hv]
  congr
  dsimp [sharedEigenvalueA]
  rw [hv, Matrix.dotProduct_smul]
  have hk_real : (k.1.1 : 𝕜) = (k.1.1 : ℝ) :=
    (RCLike.isReal_iff_coe_eq_coe.2 (hA.isSymmetric.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue k.1.1.2)).symm
  rw [hk_real, RCLike.ofReal_mul_re]
  convert mul_one _
  rw [← B.orthonormal.1 j]
  exact Eq.symm (by simp [Matrix.dotProduct, inner])

set v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  set idx := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = _)).toFun j
  have h_eig : A.toEuclideanLin v = (idx.1.1.1 : 𝕜) • v := by
    have := (hA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB hAB).subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB) idx
    rwa [mem_eigenspace_iff] at this
  have h_real : (idx.1.1.1 : 𝕜) = ↑(RCLike.re (idx.1.1.1 : 𝕜)) := by
    refine Eq.symm (RCLike.conj_eq_iff_re.mp ?_)
    apply LinearMap.IsSymmetric.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) idx.1.1.2
  have hv : A *ᵥ v = (idx.1.1.1 : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_apply, h_eig]; rfl
  rw [hv, sharedEigenvalueA, hv, dotProduct_smul, h_real]
  simp [OrthonormalBasis.orthonormal (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB) j j, Matrix.dotProduct_eq_inner]

set L_A := A.toEuclideanLin
  set L_B := B.toEuclideanLin
  set b := LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  have hv : sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j = b j := rfl
  rw [hv, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  generalize hk : (Fintype.equivOfCardEq _ : d ≃ _) j = k
  set original := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis
    (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)) _
  have h_eig : L_A (original k) = k.1.1.val • (original k) := by
    have := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB))
      (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace'
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)) k
    exact mem_eigenspace_iff.mp this.1
  apply WithLp.equiv.injective
  simp only [WithLp.equiv_apply, Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_eq_mulVec]
  rw [h_eig]
  congr
  rw [sharedEigenvalueA, hv, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply, hk]
  rw [← inner_eq_dotProduct, Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_eq_mulVec, ← WithLp.equiv_apply, h_eig]
  simp only [inner_smul_right, inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K, mul_one]
  rw [original.orthonormal.1, one_mul, ← RCLike.conj_eq_iff_re]
  exact IsSelfAdjoint.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA).isSelfAdjoint k.1.1.2

let b := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let v := b j
  let k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card _ = Fintype.card d)) j
  let μ := k.1.1
  have hv : A *ᵥ (WithLp.ofLp v) = (μ : 𝕜) • (WithLp.ofLp v) := by
    have h_mem := (hA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB hAB).subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB) k
    rw [← OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply] at h_mem
    rw [mem_eigenspace_iff, Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply] at h_mem
    exact (Submodule.mem_inf.mp h_mem).1
  rw [hv, sharedEigenvalueA, hv, dotProduct_smul, smul_eq_mul, map_mul]
  have hμ : (μ : 𝕜) = (RCLike.re μ : 𝕜) := by
    rw [← RCLike.ofReal_inj]
    exact (Module.End.IsSymmetric.eigenvalue_eq_re_of_hasEigenvalue (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) k.1.1.2).symm
  nth_rw 1 [hμ]
  rw [RCLike.ofReal_mul_re]
  congr
  simpa using b.orthonormal.1 j

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  have : ∃ (μ : ℝ), A *ᵥ v = (μ : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
    simp only [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
    let L := A.toEuclideanLin
    let M := B.toEuclideanLin
    let hL := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
    let hM := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
    let hLM := commute_euclideanLin hAB
    let decomp := hL.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hM hLM
    let ortho := hL.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hM
    let idx := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toFun j
    have := decomp.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem rfl ortho idx
    rw [mem_eigenspace_iff] at this
    use idx.1.1
    exact this.1
  obtain ⟨μ, hμ⟩ := this
  rw [hμ]
  have : sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j = μ := by
    rw [sharedEigenvalueA, hμ, dotProduct_smul_right]
    have : dotProduct v v = 1 := (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB).orthonormal.1 j
    rw [this, mul_one, RCLike.re_coe_ofReal]
  rw [this]
  ext
  simp [RCLike.real_smul_eq_coe_mul]

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  let k := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp) j
  have hv : v = (hA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB hAB).subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
      (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB) k := by
    simp [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
  have heig : A *ᵥ v = (k.1.1 : 𝕜) • v := by
    rw [hv]
    exact (DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
      (hA.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB hAB) rfl
      (hA.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB) k).1
  rw [heig, sharedEigenvalueA, heig, dotProduct_smul]
  have h_norm : dotProduct v v = 1 := by
    convert (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB).orthonormal j j; simp [inner]
  rw [h_norm, mul_one]
  congr
  exact (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.hasEigenvalue_isReal (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) k.1.1.2).symm

let v := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j
  let idx := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).toFun j
  have hAv : A *ᵥ v = idx.1.1.val • v := by
    have h := (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute'
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)
      (commute_euclideanLin hAB)).subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem rfl
      (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace'
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)) idx
    simpa [v, Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] using h.1
  rw [hAv, sharedEigenvalueA, hAv, smul_eq_mul, Map.map_mul]
  have h_real : RCLike.re idx.1.1.val = idx.1.1.val := by
    exact RCLike.conj_eq_iff_re.mp (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.isReal_of_hasEigenvalue
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) idx.1.1.prop).symm
  rw [h_real, RCLike.ofReal_re]
  congr 1
  convert (mul_one _).symm
  convert RCLike.re_one.symm
  congr
  convert (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB).orthonormal j j
